title: Cluster (Yuuzhan Vong)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Cluster''' was a military unit among the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|Fleet]], consisting of roughly 170 ships. [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] dispatched six clusters from [[Reecee/Legends|Reecee]] as part of the fleet for [[Battle Plan Coruscant]]. All six were destroyed at the [[Battle of the Black Bantha]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
